zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Joanna Trott於1464年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福。她於大約1474年與John Treat在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1480年在她的家鄉享年16歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯吉爾蓋特聖 越恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Trott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): in southwestern England, usually a variant of   Trout  .
South German: metonymic variant of   Trotter   2.

English (Somerset and Devon): nickname, either for one who moves quickly, at the pace of a trotting horse, from Middle English trot(te) (Old French trot) ‘trot’, perhaps given to a messenger (see Trotter , Trotman ); or occasionally perhaps from Middle English trot(te), trat(te) ‘old woman, hag’ (Anglo-Norman French trote).

variants.name: Trout
meanings: English (mainly Devon): nickname from Middle English trout(e), trut(e), trought(e), trot ‘trout’ (Old English trūht), perhaps for someone who caught or sold trout, or who was thought to resemble the fish in some way.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Joanna Trott was born in 1464, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She married John Treat about 1474, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1480, in her hometown, at the age of 16, and was buried in St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 16 ans, et a été enterrée à St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스킬가트 스트 존'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Joanna Trott(은)는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 John Treat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 그녀의 고향에서 16세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스킬가트 스트 존'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Она умерла в 1480 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 16 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джон'с чурч, скилгэит, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
